enumerative_failures.cause: Search depth limit (max_depth=4) prevents finding programs requiring deeper nesting
enumerative_failures.recommendation: Increasing max_depth to 5 would solve most failures but exponentially increases search time

gpt4o_failures.cause: GPT-4o generates multiply(subtract(x,2), 2) which fails on held-out test (gives wrong answer for x=4)
gpt4o_failures.pattern: GPT-4o confused about whether to subtract 1 or 2

gemini_failures.cause: Gemini 2.5 Flash consistently fails on benchmarks requiring nested arithmetic with conditionals
gemini_failures.pattern: Strong on simple operations (100% simple arithmetic) but weak on compositions
gemini_failures.hypothesis: Model may not handle the custom expression language grammar as well as GPT-4o and Claude

claude_failures.note: Claude achieved 100% success rate across all 20 benchmarks
